description_long: This is a sporty coupe car with a streamlined, aerodynamic body finished in a muted yellow-green color. The car features a prominent rear spoiler, low ground clearance, and wide tires, suggesting a design focused on performance and handling. The windows are tinted black, and the roofline slopes smoothly toward the rear, giving it a fastback profile. The front end is characterized by pop-up style headlights, a low hood, and subtle air intakes, while the rear displays angular taillights and a single visible exhaust pipe. The side profile reveals two doors, sculpted side skirts, and flush door handles, emphasizing its coupe configuration. The overall appearance is modern and aggressive, suitable for urban or racing environments.
description: A yellow-green, sporty coupe car with a fastback roofline, large rear spoiler, and tinted windows. It has two doors, pop-up headlights, and a performance-oriented design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large black spoiler, angular taillights, and single exhaust pipe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the coupe's two-door layout, sloping roofline, and wide wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pop-up headlights, low hood, and aggressive front fascia.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door, side skirt, and rear spoiler.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
